name: oadr30-ven-ud
documentation:
# Open Source OpenADR 3.0 VEN Implementation 

Use pip to install:

```bash
    pip install oadr30_ven_ud
```

Review two test files:
tests/events_test.py - You can use this to pass OpenADR cert testing
test/price_server_test.py - You can use this to populate the VTN with prices from Olivine price servers. 


# oadr3 YAML
[oadr3 yaml](https://github.com/oadr3-org/openadr3-openapi/blob/main/oadr3.0.1.yaml)

classes.name: oadr30.ven.VEN

methods.name: oadr30.ven.VEN.restore_ven
documentation: return a ven if one exists, otherwise, return None

A class representing a VEN. Initially, a VEN must be created in the VTN. If successful
the VTN will return a VEN object with an ID.

classes.name: oadr30.events.Event
documentation: Initialize using the json received from the VTN

classes.name: oadr30.descriptors.EventPayloadDescriptor
documentation:
Contextual information used to interpret event valuesMap values.
E.g. a PRICE payload simply contains a price value, an
associated descriptor provides necessary context such as units and currency.

classes.name: oadr30.descriptors.ReportPayloadDescriptor
documentation:
Contextual information used to interpret report payload values.
E.g. a USAGE payload simply contains a usage value, an
associated descriptor provides necessary context such as units and data quality.

classes.name: oadr30.interval.IntervalPeriod

methods.name: oadr30.interval.IntervalPeriod.getStartTime
documentation: Returns the [local] start time as ISO8601_DT object

methods.name: oadr30.interval.IntervalPeriod.getDuration
documentation: Returns the ISO formatted duration in seconds

Defines temporal aspects of intervals.
A duration of default PT0S indicates instantaneous or infinity, depending on payloadType.
A randomizeStart of default null indicates no randomization.

classes.name: oadr30.interval.Interval

methods.name: oadr30.interval.Interval.__getIntervalPeriod
documentation: returns the actual interval period + whether a global one (True) or local (False)

An object defining a temporal window and a list of valuesMaps.
If intervalPeriod is present, it may set temporal aspects of the interval or override event.intervalPeriod.

classes.name: oadr30.common.Point

methods.name: oadr30.common.Point.__init__
documentation:
Constructs all the necessary attributes for the point object.

Args:
    x (float): A value on the x-axis.
    y (float): A value on the y-axis.

methods.name: oadr30.common.Point.__str__
documentation:
Generates a string representation of the point.

Returns:
    str: A string representing the point as (x, y).

A class to represent a point on a 2D grid.

Attributes:
    x (float): A value on the x-axis.
    y (float): A value on the y-axis.

Args:
    x (float): A value on the x-axis.
    y (float): A value on the y-axis.

classes.name: oadr30.log.Oadr3LoggedException
documentation:
Use this class to log exceptions including traceback
log + level + include traceback.
level can only be debug, info, warning, error, critical

modules.name: oadr30.price_server_client
documentation: Use this class to communicate with a price server that only sends 3.0 payloads

classes.name: oadr30.price_server_client.PriceServerClient

methods.name: oadr30.price_server_client.PriceServerClient.getEvents
documentation: returns all events for the given program_id
Uses this class to communicate with the VTN that only sends payloads but does not follow any other OADR3 convention

methods.name: oadr30.scheduler.EventScheduler.__init__
documentation:
timeseries is an array of valuemaps
all times are in utc and not local

methods.name: oadr30.scheduler.EventScheduler.registerFutureCallback
documentation: Register to be notified of events duration seconds in the future

classes.name: oadr30.programs.Program
documentation: Initialize using the json received from the VTN

modules.name: oadr30.definitions
documentation: This file defines all the OpenADR3 definitions and enumerations

variables.name: oadr30.definitions.oadr3_event_types
documentation:
These labels are qualifiers to report name labels, to indicate the nature of the reported value.
DIRECT_READ is the default, if the qualifier is absent. Note that these apply to the data source in
general, not to specific intervals.

variables.name: oadr30.definitions.oadr3_report_reading_types
documentation: These definitions characterize the operating state of a resource under control of a VEN

variables.name: oadr30.definitions.oadr3_resource_operating_state
documentation:
The following enumerations may be assigned to the payloadType attribute of a payload included in an
interval included in a report.

variables.name: oadr30.definitions.oadr3_resource_names
documentation:
These can be used to qualify report payloads, to indicate the status of individual interval values. These
are values that may be used in payloads of type DATA_QUALITY.

variables.name: oadr30.definitions.oadr3_data_quality
documentation:
VENs, resources, subscriptions, events and programs may include a targets array, each element defining
a targeting type and a set of appropriate values. Targeting values may be used to selectively read a
subset of objects.

variables.name: oadr30.definitions.oadr3_targets
documentation: VEN and resource representations may include a list of attributes, based on the valueMap object

classes.name: oadr30.config.OADR3Config

class_variables.name: oadr30.config.OADR3Config.duration_scale
documentation:
If you want to mock up the start time so that the events start now, 
set this True

class_variables.name: oadr30.config.OADR3Config.events_start_now
documentation: Relative Path to ven peristence file

class_variables.name: oadr30.config.OADR3Config.ven_persistence_file
documentation: Relative Path to programs peristence file

class_variables.name: oadr30.config.OADR3Config.programs_persistence_file
documentation: Default ven name for the system

class_variables.name: oadr30.config.OADR3Config.default_ven_name
documentation: Default client name for the system

class_variables.name: oadr30.config.OADR3Config.default_client_name
documentation: Default resource name for the system

Use oadr3_scale to scale up/down the durations. i.e. 
Scale=1/5, changes the duration to duration /= 5
scale=5, changes the duration to duration *= 5
Mostly used for test purposes

classes.name: oadr30.config.VTNRefImpl
documentation: Some static information for the RI

classes.name: oadr30.values_map.ValuesMap

methods.name: oadr30.values_map.ValuesMap.__eq__
documentation: we need this function to check whether timeseries are identical

Represents one or more values associated with a type.
For example, a type of "PRICE" contains a single float value.

Attributes:
    type (str): Enumerated or private string signifying the nature of values.
    values (List[Union[float, int, str, bool, Point]]): A list of data points, 
    most often a singular value such as a price.

classes.name: oadr30.vtn.VTNOps

methods.name: oadr30.vtn.VTNOps.__init__
documentation:
Make sure you provide the client_id and client_secret because they are needed for subsequent authorization operations.
@auth_token_url_is_json - do not touch unless you want to be outside of RFC

methods.name: oadr30.vtn.VTNOps.__get_token__
documentation: returns the token if we already have one or asks for one if we don't

methods.name: oadr30.vtn.VTNOps.restore_ven
documentation: Returns a ven that might have been restored in the file system

methods.name: oadr30.vtn.VTNOps.create_ven
documentation: Creates a VEN using the given name (venName)

methods.name: oadr30.vtn.VTNOps.get_programs
documentation: returns an array of all programs

methods.name: oadr30.vtn.VTNOps.get_events
documentation: returns all events for the given program_id
Uses this class to communicate with the VTN
